title: CI: No New Tests label no longer works for reruns
body:
I tested it on https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/pull/28823 https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/actions/runs/26810169643/job/79059769899?pr=28823

The re-run does not pick labels set after the last push making the add label then press rerun maintianer workflow we used in cirrus unusable. Cirrus has the same problem so we had to make the API class from the job directly to always get the up to date label.

So for github actions we need to do the same, do not use the gh action label filter and use direct api calls from the job/step.

cc @kolyshkin
